notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for new_zealand. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

chunks.title: 中国护照新西兰旅游签证建议
chunks.content: 中国护照持有人短期赴新西兰旅游通常需要按 Immigration New Zealand Visitor Visa 路线准备；不要默认使用 NZeTA，除非用户属于明确的 visa waiver / transit / Australian visa recognition 等特殊情形。先确认国籍、居住地、是否从澳大利亚出发且持有合格澳签、旅行目的、停留天数、同行家庭成员和资金来源。

chunks.title: New Zealand China applicant supplementary form
chunks.content: Immigration New Zealand states that citizens of China applying from China, Hong Kong or Macau must also provide a completed supplementary form with more details of background and intentions. Applicants may provide Hukou household registration as additional identity evidence, and family members included in the application may need Hukou copies. INZ also publishes China-specific visitor visa guides and checklists.

chunks.title: New Zealand arrival funds and onward ticket
chunks.content: INZ states that on arrival visitors need a ticket to leave New Zealand at the end of the stay, proof they have enough money to buy one, or agreement that a sponsor will pay for one, plus proof of enough money to live on during the stay. VIZA AI should ask about travel dates, sponsor, funds, accommodation and return/onward travel before producing a checklist.

documents.title: New Zealand Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: New Zealand application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Apply online through Immigration New Zealand for a Visitor Visa where required; travellers also need the New Zealand Traveller Declaration before travel. Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://www.immigration.govt.nz/visas/visitor-visa/. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: New Zealand fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: New Zealand visitor intake should collect identity, passport, photo, nationality and residence, travel dates, purpose and itinerary, funds or sponsorship, onward/return travel, accommodation, family members, employment/study/home ties, health and character answers, and China-specific supplementary form data where applicable.

chunks.title: New Zealand supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: Evidence usually covers passport, acceptable photo, funds or sponsorship, onward travel, itinerary/accommodation, proof of genuine visitor intent, employment/study or family ties, medical/police certificates if requested, and translated documents where needed. Workflow guardrails: VIZA should separate the visa application from the New Zealand Traveller Declaration and should track whether the applicant needs supplementary China guide materials.

chunks.title: Standard passport identity-field answer rules
chunks.content: Standard-answer identity fields must be answered from the applicant's passport biodata page, MRZ, official identity document, or the official dropdown options. This applies to passport number, name, date of birth, sex, nationality, issuing country, issue date, expiry date, issuing authority, place of issue, and passport/document type. For issuing authority or place-of-issue questions, do not infer the answer from the pickup city, residence city, application country, or travel destination; copy the exact Authority / Issuing authority / Place of issue wording printed on the passport if present. For Chinese ordinary passports, newer valid passports may show National Immigration Administration, PRC / 中华人民共和国国家移民管理局; older valid passports may show MPS Exit & Entry Administration / 公安部出入境管理局. If the passport prints a different authority, use the passport text. For passport type, select Ordinary / Regular / Normal only for ordinary personal passports; select Diplomatic, Official, Service, Special, Travel document, Refugee, or Other only when the document explicitly indicates that type. Official sources reviewed for this standard field rule include China National Immigration Administration certificate-issuing-authority notices and the Passport Law of the People's Republic of China; the passport biodata page remains the final source for the applicant's individual answer.

chunks.title: Official-source field answer norms
chunks.content:
Official-source field answer norms for new_zealand.
Use these norms only as filling guidance; if a live official form, passport, or uploaded document shows a more specific value, that document controls the answer.

Crawled source URLs: https://www.immigration.govt.nz/visas/visitor-visa/

Passport and identity fields:
- Where to apply for New Zealand citizenship and a passport
- People travelling on a passport from some countries must apply for a Visitor Visa to visit New Zealand.
- You do not need a Visitor Visa or an NZeTA if you are an Australian citizen travelling on an Australian passport.

Issue, expiry, and validity fields:
- If you have a single-entry Visitor Visa and you leave the country, your visa will expire.
- Your passport or certificate of identity must be valid for at least 3 months after the date you plan to leave New Zealand.
- If your current temporary visa is going to expire while you are waiting for our decision, we will normally issue you an interim visa to let you stay in New Zealand lawfully.

Travel plan and port fields:
- Find out whether you need a visa or a New Zealand Electronic Travel Authority (NZeTA), and what you must do before travelling here, and on arrival.
- We will issue you either a multiple-entry or a single-entry visa, based on our assessment of your application.
- How long you can stay on a Visitor Visa depends on whether you have a multiple-entry or a single-entry visa.

Accommodation, host, and address fields:
- have enough money to pay your living expenses or have an acceptable sponsor
- You must have enough money to live on while you are in New Zealand or have an acceptable sponsor.
- You must have at least NZD $1,000 a month, or NZD $400 a month if you have already paid for your accommodation.

Purpose, occupation, work, and study fields:
- Visitor Visa checklist - China - applicants travelling to New Zealand for less than 6 months for the purpose of tourism only - 访问签证 – 仅适用于6个月以下的旅游访问 -中国地区
- If you want to do business while you visit New Zealand, apply for a Business Visitor Visa.
- If you are visiting New Zealand for a special purpose, such as a work requirement, joining a partner, or travelling for a work conference, apply for a visitor visa that matches your reason for coming here.

Funds, insurance, photo, and supporting-document fields:
- This helps to decide if you need to provide evidence of a chest X-ray or medical examination.
- Why you may need to provide evidence you are in good health
- Evidence of a chest X-ray or medical examination must be less than 3 months old when we receive them.

Answering rule: for closed-list fields, prefer the exact official option label/value. For document-backed fields, copy the passport, official identity document, application account, itinerary, invitation, accommodation, insurance, funds, or uploaded support document rather than guessing from a city, country, or prior answer.
